text.tspan: National progress towards Aichi Biodiversity Target 2, 2022
Aichi Target 2: By 2020, at the latest, biodiversity values have been integrated into national and local
development and poverty reduction strategies and planning processes and are being incorporated into national
Data source: United Nations Environment Programme, Convention on Biological Diversity and United Nations Statistics Division
